global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on food items.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Two overlapping rectangles
elements.description: Two transparent rectangles are centered, suggesting a visual representation of food items or drinks.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: A bold, white text headline at the top reads '2-for-1 tonight', emphasizing the promotional offer.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline states 'Fresh favorites nearby', providing additional context.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner features the text 'SnapMeal' in a modern font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom labeled 'Watch now' encourages user interaction.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon representing user-generated content, placed in the top left corner.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A clear, inviting button at the bottom of the ad that prompts users to take action.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating the content is user-generated.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and inviting, 2-for-1 offer, SnapMeal logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
